name: projecte-aura
description: Projecte Aura Cloud v2.2 amb backup verificable i D1 protegit per Mode Sergi.

scripts.prepare:pages: rm -rf .deploy/projecte-aura && mkdir -p .deploy/projecte-aura && cp index.html aura_core.js aura_style.css _headers .deploy/projecte-aura/
scripts.dev:pages: npm run prepare:pages && wrangler pages dev .deploy/projecte-aura --port=8788
scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:pages && wrangler pages deploy .deploy/projecte-aura --project-name=projecte-aura --branch=main
